message:
feat(tui): add mouse wheel scroll support with tmux integration

Implements proper mouse wheel scrolling throughout the interactive TUI:

- **TmuxWheelGuard**: RAII guard that overrides tmux WheelUp/WheelDown bindings
  for the current pane so wheel events are forwarded to the application instead
  of triggering tmux copy-mode. Pane-scoped (other panes unaffected). Restores
  original bindings on drop, including panic unwind. Opt-out via
  PI_TMUX_WHEEL_OVERRIDE=0 env var.

- **handle_mouse_wheel()**: Routes wheel events through a priority chain—tree UI
  → model selector → session picker → settings UI → theme picker → branch picker
  → conversation viewport. Overlay scrolling uses select_prev/select_next;
  viewport scrolling syncs content, scrolls by 1 line, and auto-re-enables
  follow-stream-tail when scrolled back to bottom.

- **Viewport chrome accounting**: view_effective_conversation_height now subtracts
  overlay chrome (model selector, session picker, settings UI, theme picker) so
  the viewport doesn't overflow behind overlays.

- **Mouse all motion**: Program now uses with_mouse_all_motion() to receive wheel
  events from the terminal.

- Mouse wheel delta reduced from 3 to 1 for finer-grained scrolling control.
- Scroll indicator updated to mention Shift+Up/Down alongside existing shortcuts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
